actionable_items: ### 1. Add one additional frontier proprietary model in Exp1 + Exp9 (execution-blocked)
- **What to change**: Include at least one of GPT-4o / Claude family in the same reporting frame.
- **Why it matters**: Strongest remaining direct mitigation of model-selection bias critique.
- **Feasible**: Requires API access/budget and rerun time; not a text-only fix.
### 2. Optional full production-log closure (scope-blocked this cycle)
- **What to change**: Replace packet-based realism evidence with real live deployment/shadow telemetry pipeline.
- **Why it matters**: Removes the "constructed/packet" external-validity caveat entirely.
- **Feasible**: Requires real log access/provenance and policy clearance; explicitly excluded in this cycle.
